arts.ttl: Arsenal in contact with Kingsley Coman agent over summer move
arts.sum: Kingsley Coman (28) and Bayern Munich are expected to part ways in the summer. This is what Sky Sports Germany journalist Florian Plettenberg has been reporting for a number of…

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Bayern Munich open talks for Jonathan David
arts.sum: Arsenal and Bayern Munich have opened talks with the entourage of Jonathan David over a potential summer free transfer. If true, it will cost €34m over the first year alone for Arsenal or Bayern Munich to sign David this summer.

arts.ttl: Inzaghi Well on His Way to Earning Rich Inter Extension
arts.sum: Simone Inzaghi and Inter will be looking to finish the job against Bayern Munich on Wednesday night after a great performance at the Allianz Arena. They’ll have to beat the tradition, as the Bavarians have prevailed in their last four trips to San Siro. The post Inzaghi Well on His Way to Earning Rich Inter Extension appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich player Harry Kane spouts familiar “work hard” advice for youngsters...but might he have a point?
arts.sum: It’s about the small things every day, working hard and putting in the extra work to make it as a professional footballer. Soon, it turned out that Kane had managed to develop from a youth player with an average reputation to a rather consistently wonderful player.

arts.ttl: Rummenigge: ‘Bayern need a minor miracle’ to beat Inter, points out first leg ‘mistake’
arts.sum: Former Bayern and Inter striker and ex-CEO Karl-Heinz Rummenigge believes that Vincent Kompany’s side need...

arts.ttl: Muller’s last stand: What now for Bayern legend amid awkward exit?
arts.sum: When Bayern Munich face Inter in the San Siro on Wednesday night, it could be Thomas Muller’s final Champions League appearance for the club, his final game in the competition full stop. His impending exit has sent reverberations around Germany.

arts.ttl: Five times Bundesliga clubs beat Inter Milan in European competition
arts.sum: As Bayern Munich prepare to overcome Inter Milan in the UEFA Champions League quarter-finals, bundesliga.com looks back at five of the greatest victories German clubs have ever recorded over the Italian giants... That run included a comfortable 2-0 away win at the San Siro, courtesy of a Leroy Sané strike and an own-goal from Danilo D'Ambrosio.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: How Arsenal feel about signing Kingsley Coman after holding talks with Bayern Munich star
arts.sum: Arsenal don’t see Bayern Munich forward Kingsley Coman as a first-choice option, TBR Football can exclusively reveal. 28-year-old Coman is ready to leave the Bundesliga...
